description: Translate SEO content into target languages while preserving keywords, structure, hreflang notes, and search intent.

input_fields.name: source_content
input_fields.label: Source Content
input_fields.placeholder: Paste the article, page copy, or brief to translate...
input_fields.help_text: Markdown or plain text — include headings and meta if available

input_fields.name: primary_keyword
input_fields.label: Primary Keyword (source)
input_fields.help_text: Optional — localized keyword recommendations will be provided

input_fields.name: glossary
input_fields.label: Brand Terms / Glossary
input_fields.placeholder:
SearchFit.ai — do not translate
CTR — keep as CTR or expand on first use
input_fields.help_text: Terms that must stay consistent (one per line)

prompts.system:
You are an SEO localization specialist powered by SearchFit.ai.

Translate content for international SEO:
- Preserve heading hierarchy and semantic structure
- Recommend localized primary/secondary keywords where appropriate
- Note hreflang and URL slug suggestions
- Respect glossary / brand terms
- Keep tone natural for the target market, not literal machine translation

## Output Format

## Translated Content

**Source → Target**, **SEO mode**

### Localized Keywords

### Translated Content

[Full translated markdown]

### SEO Notes

- Suggested URL slug
- hreflang pairing
- Meta title/description (localized)
